title: sceptridium rugulosum
intro: Sceptridium rugulosum, also known as the Chinese parasol fern, is a type of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sceptridium rugulosum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Sceptridium rugulosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
